message:
fix: paginate GitHub issue fetches to avoid truncated counts (#7642) (#7647)

fetchGitHubIssuesFromRepo fetched only per_page=50 with no pagination,
so users with more than 50 issues saw inconsistent bug counts between
the dashboard badge and the Feedback Updates tab. Add pagination
matching the existing fetchPRPages pattern (up to 5 pages = 250 issues).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
